login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your family finances

dashboard.periodSub: — Income vs Expense chart always shows full year

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Track and manage your family cash flow
transactions.savingGoalInfo: Linking a goal will deduct from this wallet and deposit into the saving goal pocket.
transactions.budgetWarning: ⚠️ Budget Alert: You have used {used}% of your budget for {category}.
transactions.budgetExceeded: ⚠️ Budget Exceeded: Adding this transaction of {amount} will exceed your budget for {category} by {exceeded}!
transactions.budgetExceededProceed: Do you want to proceed anyway?
transactions.budgetExceededMsg: This expense will exceed your {category} budget for this month.

validation.transferSame: Source and destination accounts cannot be the same.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Manage your bank accounts, cash, and e-wallets

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.subtitle: Set monthly spending limits for categories

validation.threshold: Please enter a threshold between 1 and 100.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Organize your transactions with custom categories

goals.title: Saving Goals
goals.subtitle: Track your progress towards saving targets
goals.linkedAccountInfo: When money is deposited into or spent from this pocket, the goal amount will auto-sync.
goals.completedManuallyError: Cannot manually complete the goal if target amount has not been reached.

validation.name: Please enter a goal name.
validation.target: Please enter a valid target amount.

validation.name: Please enter a description.
validation.nextDue: Please select a starting next due date.

members.title: Family Members
members.subtitle: Manage family members and their access roles

reports.title: Reports & Export
reports.subtitle: Export your financial records to CSV or PDF

validation.dates: Please select both start and end dates.
validation.order: Start date must be before or equal to end date.

shopping.title: Shopping List
shopping.subtitle: Collaborative family shopping list
shopping.zeroPriceWarning: All items must have a price. Please fill the price or delete the item if not bought.

period.title: 📅 Period Filter
period.description: Select the month and year to filter your dashboard data. Charts and summary cards will update automatically.

balance.title: 💰 Total Balance
balance.description: Your family's total balance across all linked accounts, calculated in real time.

income.title: 📈 Monthly Income
income.description: Total income recorded by all family members for the selected month.

expense.title: 📉 Monthly Expense
expense.description: Total expenses for the selected month. Keep an eye on this to stay within your budget.

net.title: ⚖️ Net Balance
net.description: Income minus expenses. Green means you're saving, red means you're spending more than you earn.

insights.title: ✨ AI Financial Insights
insights.description: Smart tips generated from your transaction patterns. Click the title to expand and view personalized recommendations.

charts.title: 📊 Charts & Analytics
charts.description: Visualize your spending by category, compare income vs. expense over the year, track expense trends, and monitor net worth growth over time.

header.title: 💸 Transactions
header.description: This is your central hub for managing all family financial transactions — income, expenses, and transfers.

add.title: ➕ Add Transaction
add.description: Click here to record a new income or expense. You can assign it to a family member, account, and category.

transfer.title: 🔄 Transfer Between Accounts
transfer.description: Move money between your family's accounts — for example from your bank account to an e-wallet.

filters.title: 🔍 Smart Filters
filters.description: Filter transactions by type (income/expense), category, member, account, or date range. Use the search box to find specific transactions quickly.

table.title: 📋 Transaction List
table.description: All transactions are listed here. Click the column headers to sort. Use the ✏️ Edit, 📋 Duplicate, and 🗑️ Delete action buttons on each row.

header.title: 🏦 Accounts
header.description: Manage all your family's financial accounts in one place — bank accounts, e-wallets, cash, and more.

add.title: ➕ Add an Account
add.description: Click here to add a new account. Choose the account type (bank, e-wallet, cash, etc.) and set the initial balance.

list.title: 💳 Account Cards
list.description: Each card shows the account name, type, and current balance. Balances update automatically as you add transactions. Use the Edit and Delete buttons to manage each account.

header.title: 🎯 Budgets
header.description: Set monthly spending limits for each expense category. The app will warn you when you're getting close to or exceeding your budget.

add.title: ➕ Create a Budget
add.description: Click here to assign a monthly budget limit to any expense category. You can set different amounts for different months.

list.title: 📊 Budget Cards
list.description: Each card shows a category's budget limit, how much has been spent, and the remaining amount. Colors change from green → yellow → red as you approach the limit.

alerts.title: 🔔 Budget Alerts
alerts.description: When any budget exceeds its limit, a red badge appears on the bell icon here. Click it to see all over-budget categories.

header.title: 🏆 Financial Goals
header.description: Set savings goals for your family — a vacation fund, emergency fund, new appliance, anything you're working towards together.

add.title: ➕ Add a Goal
add.description: Click here to create a new goal. Set a name, target amount, and deadline. The app will track your progress automatically.

list.title: 🎯 Goal Cards
list.description: Each card shows your goal name, target amount, current progress, and deadline. The progress bar fills up as you get closer to your target.

header.title: 🔁 Recurring Transactions
header.description: Automate your regular income and expenses — rent, subscriptions, salaries, utility bills — so you never forget to track them.

add.title: ➕ Add Recurring
add.description: Click here to set up a recurring transaction. Define the amount, category, frequency (daily/weekly/monthly), and start date.

list.title: 📋 Recurring List
list.description: All recurring transactions are listed here with their next due date and frequency. You can pause, edit, or delete any recurring item.

header.title: 📈 Reports
header.description: Deep-dive into your family's financial data with detailed reports, charts, and exportable summaries.

filters.title: 🗓️ Date Range Filter
filters.description: Select a custom date range to analyze any time period. You can view weekly, monthly, quarterly, or yearly data.

charts.title: 📊 Visual Reports
charts.description: Charts give you an instant visual overview of your income vs. expenses, top spending categories, and trends over time.

export.title: 📄 Export to PDF
export.description: Download a formatted PDF report of your financial data to share with your family or keep for your records.
